sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111014" key="filhteu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῑλητεύω</orth>, <sense id="n111014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φῑλήτης,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg004.perseus-grc1:159" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Merc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">159</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φηλ-</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
